parsed.query: Firecrawl Search API categories country timeout ignoreInvalidURLs enterprise response metadata
parsed.executedQuery: Firecrawl Search API categories country timeout ignoreInvalidURLs enterprise response metadata (site:docs.firecrawl.dev OR site:github.com)

constraints.focus: public Search API request fields categories country timeout ignoreInvalidURLs enterprise and response metadata fields relevant to MCP search parity

results.title: Search - Firecrawl Docs
results.description: The search endpoint combines web search with Firecrawl's scraping capabilities to return full page content for any query.

chunks.text:
```
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.firecrawl.dev/v2/search \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "query": "<string>",
  "limit": 10,
  "sources": [\
    "web"\
  ],
  "categories": [\
    {\
      "type": "github"\
    }\
  ],
  "tbs": "<string>",
  "location": "<string>",
  "country": "US",
  "timeout": 60000,
  "ignoreInvalidURLs": false,
  "enterprise": [\
    "anon"\
  ],
  "scrapeOptions": {
    "formats": [\
      "markdown"\
    ],
    "onlyMainContent": true,
    "maxAge": 172800000,
    "waitFor": 0,
    "mobile": false,
    "skipTlsVerification": true,
    "timeout": 60000,
    "parsers": [\
      "pdf"\
    ],
    "location": {
```
